description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with red ribbed crew neck, white raglan sleeves, grey mesh panel on the front and printed logo on the chestFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoLightweight and quick drying, this red tee from adidas gives a great comfortable feel and looks stylish too. The mesh panel on the tee keeps you dry and comfortable throughout an active day or hectic training schedules. Team this with adidas tracks and shoes for an action filled day on the Sports field or for working out.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
